arguments: topic: capabilities, manifest, generated-diff, rtk-report, command-policy, or release-witness
body: Inspect OAL provider capabilities, manifest ownership, generated source inputs, RTK efficiency guidance, command policy guidance, or release witness data through `oal inspect <topic>` or the OAL Inspect MCP server. Keep the working tree unchanged and report exact provider gaps, artifact counts, manifest paths, or witness hashes.
